scripts.login: cucumber-js features/login.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @login --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.signup: cucumber-js features/signup.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @signup --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.product: cucumber-js features/product.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @product --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.cart: cucumber-js features/cart.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @cart --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.payment: cucumber-js features/payment.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @payment --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.contact: cucumber-js features/contact.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @contact --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.buyer: cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @buyer --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
scripts.seller: cucumber-js features/product.feature --require steps/*.js --require hooks/*.js --tags @seller --format progress --format json:reports/report.json
